stem: A pupil is choosing the most appropriate data type for each value below.
model_answer: {"A pupil's age in whole years": "Integer", "The price of a textbook in £": "Real", "A pupil's full name": "String", "Whether the pupil has paid (yes/no)": "Boolean"}

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick one box on each row to show the most appropriate data type for each value.

rows: A pupil's age in whole years
The price of a textbook in £

mark_points.text: Age is best stored as an integer.
Price with pence is best stored as a real.
Name is best stored as a string.
A yes/no payment flag is best stored as a Boolean.
